event: Abstract Geometric View of St. Ann Street
description: An abstract geometric composition rendered in flat planes of blue, grey, yellow, and brown. Angular shapes suggest architectural forms — walls, doorways, steps, and vertical columns — reduced to their essential geometric elements. The palette is cool and restrained, with blocks of pale yellow, multiple shades of blue, grey, and a single dark brown rectangle at right. The overall effect is of a simplified, cubist-influenced urban space.
